case_title: MANNING MASON C O HOTEL SENECA VS PARKER EDNA C O PRINCE HALL APTS

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT TO PLTF.RETURNED. NO MAIL RECEPTACLE.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MANNING MASON C O HOTEL SENECA AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER EDNA C O PRINCE HALL APTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MANNING MASON C O HOTEL SENECA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PARKER EDNA C O PRINCE HALL APTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PARKER EDNA C O PRINCE HALL APTS
